message:
fix(bench): gracefully skip when pi binary missing + reduce ext_tool_call samples

- System benchmarks: replace fragile exists()+PATH check with actual
  pre-flight Command execution. Skips cleanly when binary is not built.
- Extension ext_tool_call benchmark: reduce sample_size to 10 to avoid
  thread exhaustion (EAGAIN) on resource-constrained CI runners.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
